query:
INSERT INTO products (name, description, category, price, retailPrice, thc, cbd, image, stock, farmerId, rating) VALUES
-- Vapes
('Blue Dream Vape Cart', 'Smooth and flavorful Blue Dream vape cartridge with 85% THC', 'vapes', 4500, 6000, 85.0, 0.5, '/products/vape-cart-1.jpg', 50, 1, 4.7),
('Sour Diesel Vape', 'Energizing Sour Diesel vape pen with 88% THC', 'vapes', 4800, 6500, 88.0, 0.3, '/products/vape-cart-2.jpg', 45, 1, 4.8),
('OG Kush Vape Cart', 'Classic OG Kush flavor in a premium vape cartridge', 'vapes', 4500, 6000, 86.0, 0.4, '/products/vape-cart-1.jpg', 60, 1, 4.6),
('Gelato Vape Pen', 'Sweet Gelato strain vape pen with smooth hits', 'vapes', 5000, 6500, 90.0, 0.2, '/products/vape-cart-2.jpg', 40, 1, 4.9),

-- Edibles
('Indica Gummies 10-Pack', 'Relaxing indica gummies, 10mg THC each', 'edibles', 2500, 3500, 10.0, 0.0, '/products/gummies-1.jpg', 100, 1, 4.5),
('Sativa Gummies 10-Pack', 'Energizing sativa gummies, 10mg THC each', 'edibles', 2500, 3500, 10.0, 0.0, '/products/gummies-2.jpg', 95, 1, 4.6),
('Hybrid Gummies 20-Pack', 'Balanced hybrid gummies, 5mg THC each', 'edibles', 3000, 4000, 5.0, 0.0, '/products/gummies-1.jpg', 80, 1, 4.7),
('CBD Gummies 10-Pack', 'High CBD gummies for relaxation, 2mg THC / 25mg CBD each', 'edibles', 2000, 3000, 2.0, 25.0, '/products/gummies-2.jpg', 120, 1, 4.8),

-- Concentrates
('Blue Dream Wax', 'Premium Blue Dream wax concentrate, 92% THC', 'concentrates', 6000, 8000, 92.0, 0.1, '/products/concentrate-1.jpg', 30, 1, 4.8),
('OG Kush Shatter', 'Crystal-clear OG Kush shatter, 94% THC', 'concentrates', 6500, 8500, 94.0, 0.1, '/products/concentrate-2.jpg', 25, 1, 4.9),
('Gelato Live Resin', 'Flavorful Gelato live resin, 88% THC', 'concentrates', 7000, 9000, 88.0, 0.2, '/products/concentrate-1.jpg', 20, 1, 4.7),
('Sour Diesel Crumble', 'Potent Sour Diesel crumble, 90% THC', 'concentrates', 6000, 8000, 90.0, 0.1, '/products/concentrate-2.jpg', 35, 1, 4.6),

-- Pre-Rolls
('Blue Dream Pre-Roll 1g', 'Premium Blue Dream pre-roll, ready to smoke', 'pre-rolls', 1200, 1800, 24.0, 0.5, '/zappay-logo.jpeg', 150, 1, 4.6),
('OG Kush Pre-Roll 1g', 'Classic OG Kush pre-roll, perfectly rolled', 'pre-rolls', 1200, 1800, 22.0, 0.3, '/zappay-logo.jpeg', 140, 1, 4.5),
('Sour Diesel Pre-Roll 1g', 'Energizing Sour Diesel pre-roll', 'pre-rolls', 1300, 1900, 26.0, 0.2, '/zappay-logo.jpeg', 130, 1, 4.7),
('Gelato Pre-Roll 1g', 'Sweet Gelato strain pre-roll', 'pre-rolls', 1400, 2000, 25.0, 0.3, '/zappay-logo.jpeg', 120, 1, 4.8);
